visual_description: The scene is set in a dim, industrial interior with metal railings and chains. A dark-clad figure moves swiftly across a narrow walkway, confronting another figure in the background who appears to be defending. The confrontation escalates with a bright flash of light and sparks as the dark figure strikes, causing debris to scatter and the opponent to tumble onto a metal platform.
audio_description: The audio captures the clang of metal and heavy breathing as the figures engage in combat. There is no clear speech.
